arts.ttl: “Both clubs wanted to sign him” – Father says visa issues preventing transfer to Everton or Blackburn Rovers
arts.sum: Youngster Ricsi Pisont has been blocked from joining Everton and Blackburn Rovers by visa issues. That’s at least according to his father, who has been speaking to Sportal about his son and his attempts to join a club in England.
